nasb.text: Now it came about, as they were sitting down at the table, that the word of the Lord came to the prophet who had brought him back;

esv.text: And as they sat at the table, the word of the Lord came to the prophet who had brought him back.

cnv.text: 他們二人正在席上吃喝的時候，耶和華的話臨到那把神人帶回來的先知，

ccb.text: 席间，耶和华的话临到老先知，
